title: Strategy's Michael Saylor teases BTC buy with 'working better' tweet
summary: Strategy could be set to announce it has resumed buying Bitcoin after pausing in recent weeks as the biggest crypto looks poised to close out the month down more than 3.5%.

title: Kraken ‘plans’ regulated perp contracts as rivals are quick off the blocks
summary: In the wake of CFTC approval of perpetual futures contracts tied to the spot price of Bitcoin, Kraken expects to offer those to US institutional clients within "the next month."

title: Wall Street Risk Rally Powers Past War Stalemate
summary: Three months into the Iran war, it has become all but impossible to damp the bullish spirit driving global markets for risky assets.

title: Bond Trader Bets on Fed Hike Poised for Gut Check From Jobs Data
summary: Bond traders are looking to a key jobs report this week to confirm their wagers that the US economy is strong enough to push the Federal Reserve to lift interest rates by next year.

title: How President Trump’s Immigration Order Will Feed the Stablecoin Economy, Bitcoin ATMs
summary: When the Trump family faced pressure from banks, it embraced crypto. Now, immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally face a similar choice.

title: Florida Candidate Liquidates $800K in Bitcoin to Bankroll Congressional Bid
summary: A Republican candidate jockeying to represent Florida’s 22nd Congressional District liquidated Bitcoin to help fuel his political bid.

title: Cardano Foundation cancels 2026 summit after treasury funding vote falls just short
summary: The measure needed two-thirds support but got only 65%, even after late endorsements from Cardano's founder and the Foundation CEO.
